package.name: sim_scenarios
package.description:
Runtime obstacle management for Gazebo Classic simulation.
Nodes: scenario_manager — loads a YAML scenario file and spawns/removes obstacles via Gazebo SpawnEntity / DeleteEntity services. Exposes /sim/clear_obstacles (std_srvs/Trigger).
CLI tools (ros2 run sim_scenarios ...): spawn_obstacle — one-shot spawn/delete/move of a single obstacle. Example: ros2 run sim_scenarios spawn_obstacle \ --name box_1 --model obstacle_box --x 2.0 --y 1.0
Scenario YAML files: share/sim_scenarios/scenarios/
